purpose: Track every stable semantic declaration introduced by Goal 2 separately from the frozen Goal 1 comparison cohort.

itemContract.consumerRule: consumer is the fully qualified name of a real downstream Lean declaration that exercises this API declaration
itemContract.eligibilityRule: stable declarations in public semantic leaves are included; non-root diagnostic, audit, and temporary declarations are excluded
